landing.sousTitre: Intelligent quality audit management for Leoni
landing.gestionAuditsDesc: Plan and track your product audits in real time.
landing.certifAuditeursDesc: Complete system: timed MCQ, practical test and PDF certificate.
landing.nonConformitesPdcaDesc: Detect, document and resolve non-conformities via PDCA.
landing.iaDesc: AI system ranks auditors and recommends optimal assignments.
landing.rapportsDesc: Generate professional PDF reports and auto-archive.
landing.auditeurDesc: Pass your certifications and conduct product audits.
landing.chefServiceDesc: Plan and supervise your team's audits.

hero.desc: PAP brings together, in a single web platform, LEONI product audit management, auditor certification, non-conformity tracking, and quality indicator monitoring.

landing.featuresDesc: A complete platform covering every step of the audit cycle — from planning to certification.

audit.title: Audit Management
audit.desc: Plan and track your product audits in real time. ND, Disruptive, and Requalification types across 5 LEONI sites.

certif.title: Auditor Certification
certif.desc: Complete system: timed MCQ theory test, digital practical test, and PDF certificate generation.

pdca.title: Non-conformities & PDCA
pdca.desc: Detect, document, and resolve non-conformities through the full PDCA cycle with action tracking.

qk.title: QK Indicators
qk.desc: Analytical dashboards with threshold alerts, cross-site comparisons, and quality history.

ia.title: Artificial Intelligence
ia.desc: The AI system ranks auditors, recommends optimal assignments, and automatically detects defects.

rapports.title: Reports & Archives
rapports.desc: Generate professional PDF reports, auto-archive, and access complete history.

landing.actorsDesc: Each actor has a dedicated interface tailored to their responsibilities.

auditeur.desc: The auditor is responsible for conducting product audits in compliance with LEONI standards. They perform technical checks, complete detailed reports, and manage corrective action plans (PDCA). They must also validate their skills through periodic certifications.

chefService.desc: The service manager coordinates and plans all audits within their department. They assign auditors based on skills, supervise certifications, and validate action plans.

admin.desc: The administrator ensures full management of the PAP system. They create and manage user accounts, configure exams and certification rules, and set security parameters.

responsable.desc: The central manager oversees the PAP platform across multiple sites. They analyze global performance indicators, track compliance rates, and export consolidated statistics.

expert.desc: The product audit expert validates audit criteria and rules. They control measurement instrument calibration and manage the audit question database.

steps.step1: Create your account in 3 steps with your LEONI employee ID.
steps.step2: Account validation based on the assigned role.
steps.step3: Access your personalized space according to your role.
steps.step4: Manage your audits, certifications, and quality indicators.

landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your audit management?
landing.ctaDesc: Join LEONI teams using PAP every day to ensure product quality.
landing.footerDesc: Intelligent platform for product audit management for the LEONI Tunisia group.
landing.footerBottomLeft: © {{year}} PAP · LEONI Wiring Systems Tunisia. All rights reserved.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.selectHint: Click on an item to see details

messages.CERTIF_TEST_REUSSI: Congratulations! You passed the theory exam with {score}/{total} ({percent}%), threshold {threshold}%. Now take the practical test.
messages.CERTIF_TEST_ECHOUE: You did not reach the {threshold}% threshold ({score}/{total} = {percent}%). Next attempt possible in {waitDays} days.
messages.CERTIF_BLOQUE: Your certification has been blocked due to practical test failure. Auto-unblock in {days} days.
messages.CERTIF_DEBLOQUE: Your certification has been unblocked. You can retake the practical test.
messages.CERTIF_PRATIQUE_PRET: The practical test for certification {certifName} is now available.
messages.CERTIF_PRATIQUE_REUSSI: ✅ Your practical report has been validated by the expert! Your certificate is being prepared.
messages.CERTIF_PRATIQUE_ECHOUE: Your practical test failed. Check the expert's feedback and reschedule.
messages.CERTIF_OBTENUE: Congratulations! You are now certified in {certifName}. Your PDF certificate is available.
messages.CERTIF_A_SIGNER_EXPERT: An expert must sign the certification {certifName} for auditor {auditeur}.
messages.CERTIF_A_SIGNER_CHEF: The service manager must sign the certification {certifName} for auditor {auditeur}.
messages.CERTIF_PDF_DISPONIBLE: The PDF certificate for {certifName} is now available for download.
messages.CERTIF_EXPIRE_30J: Your certification {certifName} expires in 30 days. Plan its renewal.
messages.CERTIF_EXPIRE_7J: ⚠️ Your certification {certifName} expires in 7 days. Renew as soon as possible.
messages.CERTIF_EXPIREE: ❌ Your certification {certifName} has expired. You cannot work until it is renewed.
messages.COMPTE_ACTIVE: Your account has been activated. You can now access the platform.
messages.COMPTE_DESACTIVE: Your account has been deactivated. Contact the administrator for more information.
messages.ROLE_CHANGE: Your role has been changed to « {newRole} ». Reconnect to access your new workspace.
messages.AUDIT_ASSIGNE: A {typeAudit} audit has been assigned to you: {ref} | Room: {salle} | Plant: {plant} | Due date: {date}
messages.AUDIT_EN_RETARD: Audit {ref} is {delay} days overdue. Please process it immediately.
messages.AUDIT_TERMINE_NOTIF: Audit {ref} is completed. Check the PDF report.
messages.AUDIT_PDCA_REQUIS: A PDCA plan must be filled for audit {ref} due to detected non-conformities.
messages.AUDIT_QK_DEPASSE: ⚠️ QK threshold exceeded for audit {ref} (QK = {qkValue}, threshold = {qkThreshold}). Immediate action required.
messages.RAPPEL_DEADLINE: ⏰ Reminder: audit {ref} must be performed before {deadline}.
messages.ALERTE_QK: 🔴 Critical QK alert for audit {ref}. Immediate decision needed.
